reasoning: While the composite fidelity score and shingling recall are high, the reported structural score (0.545) and specific evidence of missing content in sections 4 and 5 indicate a failure in fidelity. In official board minutes, the omission of multiple agenda sub-items and the resulting break in logical flow are significant defects that require human verification to ensure record integrity.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy is inconsistent across peer sections. Major sections 7, 8, and 10 are assigned header level 2 (H2), while major sections 11 and 12 are assigned header level 3 (H3). In the source document, these are all parallel top-level numbered sections. This inconsistency breaks the logical navigation structure for screen readers.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: The source PDF on page 7 lists '11. Standards Committee Report' and '12. Technology Committee Report' as top-level numbered headings, identical in format to sections 7, 8, and 10.
concerns.output_quote: "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "11. Standards Committee Report" (reading_order 60) and "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "12. Technology Committee Report" (reading_order 63).
concerns.location: Sections 11 and 12, elements with reading_order 60 and 63.

concerns.analysis: The reading order is significantly compromised due to the omission of large sections of structural content. In section 4 (Consent Agenda), items 'a' and 'f' are missing. More critically, in section 5 (Executive Director Report), sub-items 'a' through 'd' and the first half of item 'e' are missing entirely. This causes the text to jump from the heading directly into the middle of a sentence on the next page, fundamentally breaking the document's flow.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Page 3 of the PDF contains text for Consent Agenda items a and f, and Executive Director Report items a, b, c, d, and the beginning of e ('Richmond Community College... On October 4, an official').
concerns.output_quote: The JSON omits these sections, jumping from '5. Executive Director Report –' (reading_order 24) to 'announcement will be made...' (reading_order 29).

action_items: Verify if sections 4a, 4f, and 5a-e were present in the source PDF and restore if missing.
Standardize heading levels for sections 7, 8, 10, 11, and 12 to ensure accessibility compliance.
